docket_entries.description: MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT GALLAVAN, TIMOTHY C. HEARING SET FOR NOV-13-1996 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THAI, KATHY LAN NQOC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GALLAVAN, TIMOTHY C. $2,200.00 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,215.00, JUDGM. ENTERED IN SCA 24857 ON 2-20-97. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
